item.title: AI Developer Radar｜Daily｜2026-07-13 - Today's Summary
[sustained_hot] Dicklesworthstone/destructive_command_guard (+1413 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: The Destructive Command Guard (dcg) is for blocking dangerous git and shell commands from being executed by agents. Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1413，总 stars 3,710，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] Raphire/Win11Debloat (+2604 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Other AI Description: A simple, lightweight PowerShell script that allows you to remove pre-installed apps, disable telemetry, as well as perform various other changes to declutter and customize your Windows experience. Win11Debloat works for both Windows 10 and Windows 11. Why it matters: Other AI 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +2604，总 stars 50,611，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] moeru-ai/airi (+1422 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Other AI Description: 💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported. item.title: [sudden_breakout] hpcaitech/ColossalAI (+4 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Distributed Training & Inference Infrastructure Description: Colossal-AI is an open-source deep learning system that makes large AI models cheaper, faster, and more accessible through advanced parallelism and heterogeneous memory management. Why it matters: The repo has a sudden breakout with an acceleration of 6 (high), despite a low 7-day average star delta of -0.6. With 41,385 total stars and 4,505 forks, it's a well-established project that recently saw a spike in attention, possibly due to new benchmarks (B200 GPUs showing 50-70% throughput gains) or the release of Open-Sora and DeepSeek fine-tuning guides. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward democratizing large model training: developers can now achieve near-linear scaling on multi-GPU setups with minimal code changes, reducing the barrier to entry for building foundation models. Risk: Medium

item.title: [sudden_breakout] deepspeedai/DeepSpeed (+15 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Local LLM / Inference Description: DeepSpeed is a deep learning optimization library that makes distributed training and inference easy, efficient, and effective. Why it matters: Local LLM / Inference 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +15，前 3 日均值 2.3，加速度 6.4x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 重点看部署复杂度、性能边界和模型兼容性，判断是否能进入本地 AI 应用栈。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] Graphify-Labs/graphify (+1631 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +1631，前 3 日均值 653.3，加速度 2.5x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low
